@sample @demo @reference: DL-13 UI-verification evidence-packet semantic schema (I-17B mobile).
//schema-ownership: Exact schema syntax + versioning is owned by DL-02/DL-10. This encodes the DL-13 semantic evidence fields (§Evidence packet/report fields) as a structural reference consumed by the validator + future evidence collectors.

required_semantic_fields.specialist_report_ref: specialist UI agent report path + hash where applicable
required_semantic_fields.advisory_findings: non-blocking classification unless promoted under DL-13
required_semantic_fields.missing_artifact_rows: explicit deterministic failures for any missing row
required_semantic_fields.failure_details: issue class, rule id, state id, device id, evidence path, actual/expected, reproducibility, suggested owner/fixer class

deterministic_hard_block: advisory-only check posing as deterministic hard block
advisory_non_blocking: specialist review lacking structured deterministic evidence
low-confidence computer-vision findings not backed by geometry/baseline/a11y evidence

promotion_rules: advisory may block only via (a) conversion to a deterministic rule, (b) approved plan/task criterion naming reviewer+evidence, or (c) operator approval gate with evidence paths + scope (DL-13 §Promoting advisory findings to blocking).
